# TropiKnit - llms.txt
# This file guides AI/LLM crawlers about our site content and structure.
# Learn more: https://llmstxt.org

# TropiKnit is a factory-direct bulk custom apparel manufacturer based in Shenzhen, China.
# Founded in 2008, serving 8,000+ organizations in 80+ countries.
# MOQ: 20 pcs (apparel), 50 pcs (laser engraving), 20 pcs (3D printing).
# Certifications: ISO 9001:2015, OEKO-TEX Standard 100, BSCI, GOTS, Alibaba Gold Supplier.

## About
TropiKnit is a B2B custom apparel manufacturer specializing in bulk t-shirt printing, team uniforms, corporate branded merchandise, and university club apparel. The company operates a 50,000-square-foot factory with 300+ workers in Shenzhen, Guangdong, China. In addition to apparel, TropiKnit provides laser engraving/cutting and 3D printing services for custom prototypes and brand accessories.

## Products & Services
- Bulk Custom Cotton T-Shirts (180gsm, MOQ 20 pcs, from $3.20/pc)
- Performance Sport Tees (200gsm polyester, MOQ 20 pcs, from $4.50/pc)
- Custom Hoodies & Sweatshirts (340gsm, MOQ 20 pcs, from $8.80/pc)
- Polo & Corporate Shirts (embroidered, MOQ 20 pcs)
- Laser Engraving & Cutting (fiber & CO2, MOQ 50 pcs)
- 3D Printing & Prototyping (SLA, FDM, SLS, MOQ 20 pcs)

## Decoration Methods
Screen printing, DTG (direct-to-garment), full sublimation, embroidery, heat transfer, woven labels.

## Pricing Tiers
- 20-49 pcs: Standard pricing
- 50-99 pcs: ~19-20% savings
- 100-299 pcs: ~34-35% savings
- 300+ pcs: ~46-48% savings

## Production & Shipping
- Standard production: 12-15 days
- Rush production: 7 days
- DHL/FedEx Express: 3-7 days
- Air Cargo: 5-10 days
- Sea Freight: 18-35 days
- China-Europe Rail: 14-20 days
- Incoterms: FOB, CIF, DDP, EXW

## Payment Methods
T/T Wire Transfer (30% deposit), PayPal, Payoneer, L/C (orders $10,000+), Alibaba Trade Assurance, USDT.

## Contact
- Email: tropiknit@outlook.com
- WhatsApp: +852 5709 9856
- Address: 11th Floor, Zhujiang International Center, Longgang District, Shenzhen, China
- Website: https://www.tropiknit.com/
